headline: 1 S&P 500 Stock to Target This Week and 2 That Underwhelm
summary: The S&P 500 (^GSPC) is home to the biggest and most well-known companies in the market, making it a go-to index for investors seeking stability. But not all large-cap stocks are created equal - some are struggling with slowing growth, declining margins, or increased competition.

headline: Elise Stefanik Eyes Next Move As Congressional Tenure Nears End
summary: Elise Stefanik is leaving Congress after evolving into one of Donald Trump's strongest allies while keeping future political ambitions alive.

headline: Palantir CEO Alex Karp Says 'Just Copy The Norwegians' When It Comes To Building Endurance And Strength: 'Run Like A Snail'
summary: Palantir CEO Alex Karp prioritizes VO2 max and muscle for long-term health. He advises starting with aerobic capacity, then adding strength.

headline: Trump Praises Palantir (PLTR) on Truth Social after Buying the Company’s Stock, Records Show
summary: Palantir Technologies Inc. (NASDAQ:PLTR) is one of the 10 Best ARK Stocks to Buy Right Now. On May 15, CNBC reported that US President Donald Trump bought shares of Palantir Technologies Inc. (NASDAQ:PLTR) weeks before praising the company on Truth Social, noting records from the U.S. Office of Government Ethics. The filings show Trump purchased […]
